cards.name: Back Off!
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was pushed into a different territory.

cards.name: Bloodscent
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if any enemy fighters in friendly territory have 2 or more damage tokens and/or are vulnerable. If you are the underdog, those enemy fighters can be in enemy territory instead.

cards.name: Hands Off!
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was on a feature token and was driven back.

cards.name: Home Advantage
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter's failed Attack if the target was a friendly fighter in friendly territory.

cards.name: Lead by Example
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if your leader is in friendly territory and Attacked 2 or more times this battle round.

cards.name: No Business Here
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was in friendly territory and was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

cards.name: No Trespassers
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was in friendly territory and was slain.

cards.name: Pinned!
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if an enemy fighter was driven back into an edge hex in friendly territory this battle round.

cards.name: Ready or Not
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more enemy fighters are in friendly territory and each enemy fighter is damaged and/or adjacent to any friendly fighters.

cards.name: Spoiling for a Fight
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if your leader is in friendly territory and is within 2 hexes of 2 or more other fighters from 2 or more warbands.

cards.name: This is Our Turf!
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if there are more friendly fighters with Move and/or Charge tokens in friendly territory than there are enemy fighters with Move and/or Charge tokens in friendly territory.

cards.name: Usurped
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is on a feature token that the target was on when you picked them to be the target of that Attack.

cards.name: Audacious Denial
cards.text: If your leader is in friendly territory, pick an enemy fighter adjacent to them in friendly territory. Your leader immediately Attacks that fighter with 1 or their melee weapons that has a Damage characteristic of 1.

cards.name: Deny Invaders
cards.text: In the next turn, friendly fighters' weapons have +1 Attack dice while they are in friendly territory.

cards.name: Hidden Snares
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter in friendly territory and within 1 hex of a feature token. If you are the underdog, you can pick an enemy fighter in enemy territory and within 1 hex of a feature token instead. That fighter's weapons have -1 Attack dice in the next turn.

cards.name: Keep Them at Bay
cards.text: In the next turn, friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Range, to a maximum of 2, for Attacks that target enemy fighters in friendly territory.

cards.name: Mind Your Step
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter in friendly territory. Push that fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end in neutral or enemy territory.

cards.name: Mystical Misdirection
cards.text: Pick 2 treasure tokens in friendly territory. Swap the positions of those treasure tokens.

cards.name: Paths Unknown
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter in friendly territory. If you are the underdog, you can pick a friendly fighter in enemy territory instead. In the next turn, that fighter cannot be picked to be the target of an Attack.

cards.name: Poor Footing
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter in friendly territory and within 1 hex of a feature token. Give that fighter a Move token.

cards.name: Secrets of the Realm
cards.text: Give each enemy fighter in friendly territory that is adjacent to a friendly fighter and/or feature token a Stagger token.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Balance of Ghyran
cards.text: Equilibrium: Immediately after an enemy fighter's successful Attack, if this fighter was the target of that Attack and the attacker is within 3 hexes of them, roll 3 Attack dice. If the roll contains any {icon:sword}, inflice 1 damage on the attacker.

cards.name: Blocked!
cards.text: Hinder: The first time each enemy fighter enters a hex adjacent to this fighter as part of a Move, roll an Attack dice. On a {icon:hammer} or {icon:crit}, that fighter must end that Move in that hex.

cards.name: Bounty of Ghyran
cards.text: This fighter is Inspired while they are in friendly territory. Immediately after your next Action step, Uninspire this fighter and discard this card.

cards.name: Crippling Blow
cards.text:
Ranged Attack action
{icon:hex} 2 {icon:sword} 3 {icon:damage} 1
If the target is in friendly territory, give that fighter a Move token.

cards.name: Goading Defender
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Save while they are in friendly territory. Discard this card if this fighter is picked to be the target of a Ploy or is damaged.

cards.name: Great Speed
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Move.

cards.name: Hidden Aid
cards.text: Enemy fighters adjacent to this fighter are Flanked.

cards.name: Hidden Traps
cards.text:
Melee Attack action
{icon:hex} 1 {icon:hammer} 3 {icon:damage} 1
This weapon has Grievous if the target is within 1 hex of a feature token in friendly territory.

cards.name: Killing Blow
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous if the target is damaged.

cards.name: True Grit
cards.text:
This Upgrade can only be given to your leader.
Rolls of {icon:block} and {icon:dodge} count as successes in Save rolls for friendly fighters adjacent to this fighter.
